base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_triforce_fragment — a pickup_item from 1986 legend of zelda. Triforce of Wisdom fragment — 1 per dungeon (Levels 1-8). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Triforce of Wisdom fragment — 1 per dungeon (Levels 1-8); 2-frame sparkle. Need all 8 to enter Level 9
